ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine (e.g., African, American) */,
  "cuisine_number" INTEGER /* Number of menu items in the cuisine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cuisine */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the cuisine image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cuisine was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foods" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the food item */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine the food item belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the food item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the food item image */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the food item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the food item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the food item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foods_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the food item sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order containing the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine generating revenue */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date of the revenue entry */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the cuisine */,
  "percentage_share" REAL /* Percentage share of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine offering the menu item */,
  "menu_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the menu item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the menu item image */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the menu item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order containing the item */,
  "menu_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the menu item in the order */,
  "sub_total" REAL /* Subtotal of the menu item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_menu_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("menu_item_id") REFERENCES menu_items ("menu_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_partners" (
  "delivery_partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery partner */,
  "delivery_partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery partner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the delivery partner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the delivery partner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the delivery partner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the delivery partner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_partner_id")
)
